prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your graduate school decisions forward
items: Create a comprehensive list of 8-12 graduate programs that align with your career goals and interests
Schedule informational interviews with 3-5 current graduate students or recent alumni from your target programs
Research and document admission requirements, deadlines, and standardized test requirements for each program on your list
Assess your current academic and professional qualifications against typical admission profiles for your target programs
Calculate the total cost of attendance for each program including tuition, fees, living expenses, and opportunity costs
Create a detailed timeline mapping all application deadlines, test dates, and preparation milestones for the next 12 months
